ul.li: source_type: Discriminant for reading JIT state.
target_type: Target area in reconstructed InterpFrame.
source_reg: If REGISTER, maps to index in SavedRegisters struct.
source_spill_slot: If SPILL, maps to rbp - (slot+1)*8.
sort_order: Ensures operand stack is rebuilt from bottom to top.

g.title: 8-byte storage for register ID, frame offset, or immediate
Correct push sequence for operand stack (ascending)
8-byte storage for register ID, frame offset, or immediate
Correct push sequence for operand stack (ascending)
